title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people buying cinema tickets. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: Two friends are buying tickets at a cinema. One is speaking to the assistant at the ticket desk and the other is looking at a film poster. There are popcorn boxes and bright lights in the entrance area.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people roller skating. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: Three young people are roller skating along a wide path in a park. They are wearing helmets and smiling as they skate together. There are trees, grass and people walking behind them.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
